name: 20ct Christmas Mixed Finial Set Red/Green/Gold - Wondershop™
description:
Add graceful style to your seasonal setup with this 20-Count Christmas Mixed Finial Set from Wondershop™. This plastic ornament set includes 20 ornaments in assorted shapes, including finials, snowflakes and balls, in vibrant shades of green, red and gold with lovely patterns. Each ornament has a shiny cap with a coordinating top loop for easy hanging, and the shatter-resistant construction is great for homes with pets or young kids.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
